_meta.description: Live health snapshot of every Node in the Grid. Written by CI workflows and agents; read by Claude Code, HoneyHub (when live), and the developer. Not a substitute for the Project board — this tracks repo-level readiness, not individual work items.
changelog: 1.1: added tracked_workflows per repo for ADR-0012 grid-health aggregator
1.2: aligned tracked_workflows with live repo workflows and excluded legacy/duplicate PR gates

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Kernel
nodes.notes: Kernel v0.7.0 is the current Core baseline: canonical WellKnownNodes, typed TenantId, and Grid/Operation context contracts.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Transport
nodes.notes: Aligned to Kernel 0.7.0 abstractions; full Kernel runtime dependency removed; repo changelog finalized after v0.6.0 tag.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Vault
nodes.notes: Aligned to Kernel 0.7.0; provider facade cancellation behavior and provider-helper consolidation completed.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Vault.Rotation
active_blockers: No published package/tag yet by decision
nodes.notes: Repo scaffolded. Timer jobs establish Kernel Grid/Operation context; placeholder provider rotators consolidated. No release tag required for this pass.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Auth
nodes.notes: Auth emits fail-soft security audit records through HoneyDrunk.Audit.Abstractions 0.1.0 while preserving validation-only boundary and token/claims privacy.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Web.Rest
nodes.notes: Requires Kernel request context at registration and live execution; Kernel operation correlation is authoritative.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Data
nodes.notes: Aligned to Kernel 0.7.0 and Transport 0.6.0; outbox enrichment requires operation context or explicit CorrelationId/TenantId.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Audit
nodes.notes: Initial Audit Node released: Abstractions and Data packages provide append-only-by-interface durable audit records, query surface, redaction-before-append boundary, EF-ready data store, in-memory fixtures, and contract canaries.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Notify
nodes.notes: Aligned to Kernel canonical Notify identity; queue credential resolution moved behind Vault-backed secret boundary. NuGet/GitHub Release published; changelog hygiene follow-up remains in Notify PR #16.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Communications
nodes.notes: Full Kernel runtime dependency removed; runtime now consumes Kernel abstractions only and Notify.Abstractions 0.3.0. Runtime/Abstractions v0.2.0 release workflows succeeded.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Pulse
active_blockers: Container image publication blocked by upstream Ubuntu sed CVE-2026-5958
nodes.notes: Aligned to Kernel canonical Pulse identity and Transport 0.6.0; NuGet/GitHub Release published. Container scan blocked only image push, not package release.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Observe
nodes.notes: ADR-0010 Phase 1 Node. Contracts and connector provider-slot packages (GitHub, Azure, HTTP) will ship from the Observe repo; no separate connectors Node.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Actions
active_blockers: D6 batch-filing action not yet built (primary bottleneck for initiative launch)
nodes.notes: hive-field-mirror.yml shipped (Actions#22 closed). D6 batch-filer will incorporate mirror step, resolving D5 for the primary flow. hive-backfill-issue.sh exists for manual one-offs.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Lore
nodes.notes: LLM-compiled living wiki. 6 packets scoped and ready to file. On deck after ADR-0005/0006 wave completes.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Architecture
active_blockers: Org Project auto-add not yet enabled
nodes.notes: Command center. Grid-health.json, contracts.json, sector-interaction-map.md added 2026-04-12.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Standards
nodes.notes: Shared analyzers, EditorConfig, and build tooling referenced Grid-wide (invariants 26, 27, 58). ADR-0047 adds the test-stack Directory.Build.props fragment, coverlet.runsettings tier templates, and the Thread.Sleep analyzer rule.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Studios
nodes.notes: Public website. Site-sync workflow active.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Agents
nodes.notes: Agent runtime and lifecycle. Designed in ai-sector-architecture.md. Repo context docs in repos/HoneyDrunk.Agents/.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.AI
active_blockers: Scaffold packet (HoneyDrunk.AI#2 — packet 03 of adr-0016-honeydrunk-ai-standup) not yet executed
nodes.notes: ADR-0016 standup ADR Accepted 2026-04-19. Catalog surface registered (7 contracts per D3). Awaiting scaffold execution: HoneyDrunk.AI.Abstractions (7 contracts), HoneyDrunk.AI runtime, four provider-slot packages (OpenAI/Anthropic/AzureOpenAI/InMemory), Standards wiring, CI with api-compatibility canary scoped to Abstractions (D8), InMemory provider for Evals/CI determinism.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Memory
nodes.notes: Agent memory — short-term, long-term, scoped. Designed in ai-sector-architecture.md.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Knowledge
nodes.notes: External knowledge ingestion, embeddings, RAG pipelines.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Evals
nodes.notes: Prompt evaluation, regression testing, model comparison.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Capabilities
nodes.notes: Tool registry, discovery, permissioning, versioning.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Flow
nodes.notes: Workflow engine, multi-step pipelines, sagas, compensation.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Operator
nodes.notes: Human oversight — approvals, safety, circuit breakers, cost controls, audit.

nodes.name: HoneyDrunk.Sim
nodes.notes: Simulation, plan evaluation, risk analysis.
